footer.noLogs: We believe in the right to anonymity. Our platform is built on a No-Logs Policy. We do not track your IP address, browser fingerprint, or session data. Membership data is encrypted at rest and stored in secure servers. Your "Security Level" choice is strictly honored: we will never publish your name or affiliation without your explicit, authenticated consent.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Lion & Sun Tech Association. All rights reserved.

home.title: Lion & Sun Tech Association
home.subtitle: Building Trust, Security, and Transparency
home.mission: Dedicated to advancing technology ethics, digital security, and member safety.
home.whyJoinUsSubtitle: As defined in our association articles, the Association shall work to:
home.articlesSubtitle: The Articles of Association of the Lion & Sun Technology Association
home.article1Desc: This association is a specialized, non-profit entity that operates to advance digital freedom in Iran. We operate at the intersection of technology and human rights to ensure that all Iranians can access the digital world without fear or restriction.
home.article2p1Desc: Commitment to a united and indivisible Iran.
home.article2p2Desc: Complete separation of religious institutions from political governance.
home.article2p3Desc: Full protection of individual freedoms and equality of all before the law.
home.article2p4Desc: Supporting the people's right to choose the type of government (republic or monarchy) through a free referendum.
home.article3Desc: The association shall work in the fields of combating censorship, privacy and anti-surveillance, digital equity, and infrastructure resilience — developing decentralized solutions for a free Iranian digital infrastructure.
home.article4p1Desc: Members must be technology professionals or researchers who formally commit to the four pillars.
home.article4p2Desc: The association remains neutral regarding the outcome of any future referendum and focuses solely on technical preparedness for a free society.
home.article4p3Desc: All financial resources and projects must be transparent to prevent infiltration by entities opposing the four pillars.
home.mandate1Desc: Develop and promote tools to bypass state-mandated internet shutdowns and filtering.
home.mandate2Desc: Advocate for and implement encryption and privacy-preserving technologies to protect citizens from state monitoring.
home.mandate3Desc: Ensure that digital tools and opportunities are accessible without discrimination based on belief, gender, or ethnicity.
home.mandate4Desc: Study and propose decentralized tech solutions for a free Iranian digital infrastructure.

pledge.title: The Pledge
pledge.subtitle: To join our community, you must understand and accept our core principles.
pledge.instruction: Read each pillar carefully and click 'Accept' to proceed.

pillar1.title: Integrity
pillar1.description: We commit to honesty, transparency, and accountability in all our actions. We stand against deception and uphold the highest ethical standards.

pillar2.title: Secularism
pillar2.description: We believe in the separation of technology policy from religious influence. Our organization operates on scientific principles and reason.

pillar3.title: Equality
pillar3.description: We embrace diversity and ensure equal access to technology and opportunities for all members, regardless of background.

pillar4.title: Self-Determination
pillar4.description: We respect individual autonomy and the right of each member to make informed decisions about their participation and data.

pledge.acceptAll: Please accept all pillars to continue.
pledge.pledgeComplete: You have accepted all four pillars. You may now proceed with the membership application.

membership.title: Join Our Community
membership.subtitle: Complete the membership application
membership.securityLevelHelp: Choose how you want your involvement to be handled.
membership.publicAdvocateDesc: I am willing to be listed in the public directory and represent the association.
membership.discreteContributorDesc: I want to contribute code/expertise but remain anonymous in public records.
membership.confidentialMemberDesc: My involvement must remain strictly internal and encrypted.
membership.dataDisclaimer: Your data will be stored in a secure, non-extradition jurisdiction and encrypted at rest.

trust.title: Trust Center
trust.subtitle: Security, Transparency & Member Safety
trust.noLogsDescription: We do not store IP addresses, session data, or browser fingerprints. Your privacy is our priority.
trust.encryptionDescription: All sensitive data is encrypted at rest using industry-standard protocols.
trust.auditDescription: Regular independent security audits ensure our infrastructure meets global standards.
trust.jurisdictionDescription: Your data is stored in jurisdictions that provide maximum legal protection for privacy.
trust.digitalFreedomSubtitle: We believe in a free and open internet. Here are the tools we recommend and support to help Iranians access uncensored information and communicate securely.
trust.secureMessagingDesc: BitChat is a peer-to-peer, end-to-end encrypted messenger that works without centralized servers. No phone number required, no metadata collected. Your conversations remain truly private.
trust.outsideIranDesc: Conduit is a relay system that allows you to donate your bandwidth to help people inside Iran bypass internet censorship. By running a Conduit node on your computer, you create a secure bridge that routes traffic for those who are blocked. No technical expertise required — just install and run.
trust.outsideIranHelp: Every node makes a difference. Help expand the network of freedom.
trust.insideIranTitle: Use Psiphon to Access Free Internet
trust.insideIranDesc: Psiphon is a trusted circumvention tool used by millions to bypass state-imposed internet filtering and shutdowns. It combines VPN, SSH, and HTTP proxy technology to give you unrestricted access to the open internet.
trust.insideIranHelp: Always download Psiphon from official sources. Share the link with people you trust.
trust.safetyNoticeText: Always use these tools responsibly. Enable your device's security features, keep software updated, and never share your identity or credentials on untrusted platforms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we protect your data and respect your privacy.
privacy.section1Content: We collect only the minimum information necessary for membership and platform operation. This includes your chosen display name, email address, and selected security level. We do NOT collect IP addresses, browser fingerprints, device identifiers, location data, or any tracking cookies.
privacy.section2Content: The Lion & Sun Tech Association operates under a strict No-Logs Policy. We do not record, store, or monitor your browsing activity, session data, connection timestamps, or any metadata that could be used to identify or profile you. Our infrastructure is designed from the ground up to ensure that no logs exist.
privacy.section3Content: All member data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 encryption. Data in transit is protected with TLS 1.3. Your security level selection determines the additional layers of protection applied to your profile — from public visibility to fully encrypted, compartmentalized storage.
privacy.section4Content: All data is stored in secure servers located in jurisdictions with strong privacy protections and no data-sharing agreements with authoritarian governments. We do not store any data in Iran or in countries that cooperate with the Islamic Republic's surveillance apparatus.
privacy.section5Content: We never sell, trade, or share your personal information with third parties. No advertising networks, analytics companies, or government agencies receive any data from us. The only exception would be a lawful order from the jurisdiction where our servers are located, and even then, our No-Logs architecture ensures there is minimal data to provide.
privacy.section6Content: You have the right to access, modify, or permanently delete your data at any time. You may request a full export of your data or complete account deletion by contacting us. Confidential members can exercise these rights through our encrypted communication channels.
privacy.section7Content: Our platform uses only essential, session-based cookies required for authentication and language preference. We use no analytics trackers, no advertising pixels, no social media widgets, and no third-party scripts that could compromise your privacy.
privacy.contact: Questions about our privacy practices? Contact us at privacy@lionandsuntech.org via encrypted email.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The terms governing your use of the Lion & Sun Tech Association platform.
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using the Lion & Sun Tech Association platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use our services. These terms apply to all members, contributors, and visitors.
terms.section2Content: All members must accept and uphold the Four Pillars of the Association: Territorial Integrity, Secular Democracy, Legal Equality, and the Right to Self-Determination. Membership is contingent on formal acceptance of these principles through the Pledge process. Advocacy against these pillars is grounds for membership revocation.
terms.section3Content: Members agree to: act with integrity and transparency in all association activities; respect the chosen security level of other members; not attempt to unmask, dox, or expose confidential or discrete members; contribute constructively to the association's technical mission; and refrain from using association resources for personal financial gain.
terms.section4Content: Members choose from three security levels: Public Advocate, Discrete Contributor, or Confidential Member. Your selection is binding and honored at all times. Intentionally violating another member's chosen security level is a serious breach that will result in immediate expulsion.
terms.section5Content: All tools, code, and resources developed under the association's technical mandate are released under open-source licenses for the benefit of all Iranians. Members retain copyright to their individual contributions but grant the association a perpetual, royalty-free license to use and distribute those contributions.
terms.section6Content: The following are strictly prohibited: using the platform to promote or support the Islamic Republic or any authoritarian regime; engaging in harassment, discrimination, or threats against members; attempting to compromise the security infrastructure; sharing other members' private information without consent; and using the platform for illegal activities in the hosting jurisdiction.
terms.section7Content: The association provides its platform and services 'as is' without warranties. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of our platform or recommended tools. Members acknowledge that circumventing government censorship carries inherent risks, and the association cannot guarantee absolute security or anonymity.
terms.section8Content: These terms may be updated periodically. Members will be notified of material changes via the platform. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms. The association's Board of Directors reserves the right to modify these terms in accordance with the Foundation Articles.
terms.contact: Questions about our terms? Contact us at legal@lionandsuntech.org via encrypted email.

security.title: Security Report
security.subtitle: A transparent overview of our security infrastructure, practices, and commitment to protecting our members.
security.overviewContent: The Lion & Sun Tech Association was built with security as its foundation, not an afterthought. Every architectural decision — from server location to data handling — is made with the safety of our members in mind, particularly those operating under authoritarian surveillance. Our threat model accounts for state-level adversaries.
security.measure1Desc: All sensitive communications and stored data use AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Confidential member data is additionally protected with zero-knowledge encryption.
security.measure2Desc: Our systems are architected to produce zero logs. No IP addresses, connection timestamps, session identifiers, or browsing patterns are recorded at any point in our infrastructure.
security.measure3Desc: Servers are located in privacy-friendly jurisdictions with no data-sharing agreements with authoritarian governments. All servers use full-disk encryption and secure boot.
security.measure4Desc: Member data is compartmentalized across isolated network segments. A breach in one system cannot cascade to compromise other members' data or the broader infrastructure.
security.measure5Desc: All administrative access requires multi-factor authentication, hardware security keys, and is logged with cryptographic audit trails. Access follows strict least-privilege principles.
security.measure6Desc: Independent third-party security audits are conducted regularly. Our open-source tools are peer-reviewed and publicly auditable by the security community.
security.infraContent: Our infrastructure is designed for resilience, security, and reliability. Below are our current operational metrics.
security.incidentContent: In the event of a security incident, our response team follows a strict protocol: immediate containment, forensic analysis, member notification within 24 hours, and a public transparency report. We believe our members have the right to know about any event that could affect their safety.
security.incidentContact: Report a security concern: security@lionandsuntech.org (PGP encrypted email supported)
security.disclosureContent: We welcome security researchers who discover vulnerabilities in our systems. Please report them responsibly to security@lionandsuntech.org. We commit to acknowledging reports within 48 hours, providing updates on remediation, and crediting researchers (with their consent). We will never pursue legal action against good-faith security researchers.

chat.title: Community Chat
chat.subtitle: Connect with LSTA members in real-time through our secure Matrix-powered chat room.
chat.encryptedDesc: This chat is powered by Matrix, a decentralized, open-source protocol. Your messages are encrypted and no central authority controls the network.
chat.step1Desc: Sign up for a free Matrix account directly in the chat window above or at app.element.io.
chat.step2Desc: Once logged in, you'll automatically be in the LSTA community room. Say hello!
chat.step3Desc: Discuss projects, share ideas, and collaborate securely with fellow members.
chat.loginDesc: Sign in with your Matrix account to chat.
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Be the first to say hello!
chat.guestNotice: Log in with your Matrix account to start chatting.

services.title: Community Services
services.subtitle: Free professional services to support our community members worldwide.
services.resumeDesc: Looking for a job abroad? We offer free, professional resume reviews to help Iranian tech professionals land opportunities across the globe. Our team of experienced reviewers will provide actionable feedback to strengthen your application.
services.resumeStep1: Upload your resume (PDF, DOC, or DOCX, max 5MB)
services.resumeStep2: Tell us which country you're applying to
services.resumeStep3: We'll review and send feedback within 10 business days
services.successMsg: Your resume has been submitted. We'll review it and send you feedback within 10 business days.
services.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
services.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
services.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a PDF, DOC, or DOCX file.
services.disclaimer: Your data is handled securely and only used for the purpose of reviewing your resume. We do not share your information with third parties.
